question.label: Next two weeks
question.name: Given what we've talked through, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
question.description: Closes on a concrete near-term commitment without opening a new thread.

answer: I want to start with one mentoring commitment that has clear scope and a review point next month.

assessment.note: She names a specific near-term move — a mentoring commitment with clear scope and a review point — which signals both growth direction and clearer structure.

history.answer_excerpt: I do not know what would move the next decision.
I am less motivated in team rituals lately.
The feedback was not specific enough.
I want impact at org level, not just strong project work.
I am still thinking about last cycle.
The feedback was not specific enough.
I want to start with one mentoring commitment that has clear scope and a review point next month.
